metadata.description: Production-grade Claude Code configuration. Evidence Policy for anti-hallucination, 17 deterministic hooks, modular core/extension skills, 3 MCP profiles. Built for developers working with sensitive data.

plugins.name: claude-code-config
plugins.description: Core configuration: CLAUDE.md, rules, hooks, and universal skills (routing, brainstorming, TDD, worktrees, mentoring).

extensions.name: security-audit
extensions.description: Security audit for financial applications. Regulatory compliance, fraud detection.

extensions.name: archcode-genomics
extensions.description: Chromatin loop extrusion simulation. ClinVar variants, pathogenicity prediction.

extensions.name: geoscan
extensions.description: Satellite gold prospecting. Sentinel-2 spectral indices, Isolation Forest.

extensions.name: notebooklm
extensions.description: Query Google NotebookLM notebooks. Browser automation, persistent auth.

extensions.name: suno-music
extensions.description: Suno AI prompt engineering for EDM, hardstyle, hyperpop, rap-drill.
